//: GMAIL provider template. One block per Gmail account. Copy the entry under
//2: mcpServers into the USER'S .mcp.json (project) or ~/.claude.json, and rename it (e.g. gmail-personal, gmail-work).
//env: GMAIL_OAUTH_PATH points at ONE shared OAuth client (gcp-oauth.keys.json).
//env2: GMAIL_CREDENTIALS_PATH is per-account; generated by the `auth` step (see connect-provider.md).
//secrets: No values are secret in this block itself — the token files it points to ARE (gitignored).
